diary_entries.entry: The aurora changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Another year. Rare Martian aurora lights the sky. The colony feels hopeful. My empathy grows stronger.
The aurora changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.

meta_awareness: Ares (year 45): 'I wonder if the data sloshing through our colony is someone else's frame output becoming our frame input.'
